test-case.description: runs without failing the repository in advisory mode
test-case.name: Forbidden pattern scan.advisory mode.runs without failing the repository in advisory mode

test-case.description: fails on an embedded credential assignment
test-case.name: Forbidden pattern scan.blocking findings.fails on an embedded credential assignment

test-case.description: honors an unexpired allowlist entry
test-case.name: Forbidden pattern scan.blocking findings.honors an unexpired allowlist entry

test-case.description: does not honor expired allowlist entries
test-case.name: Forbidden pattern scan.blocking findings.does not honor expired allowlist entries

test-case.description: passes repository health validation
test-case.name: Repository health.rebuilt repository.passes repository health validation

test-case.description: fails when required governance files are absent
test-case.name: Repository health.invalid repository.fails when required governance files are absent

test-case.description: rejects traversal
test-case.name: Validate contract action.path safety.rejects traversal

test-case.description: passes contract validation
test-case.name: Validate contract action.valid repository.passes contract validation

test-case.description: fails when required documentation is missing
test-case.name: Validate contract action.invalid downstream repository.fails when required documentation is missing

test-case.description: rejects Passed evidence with NotRun tests
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.contradictory status.rejects Passed evidence with NotRun tests

test-case.description: accepts a valid artifact hash and size
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.accepts a valid artifact hash and size

test-case.description: rejects an artifact hash mismatch
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.rejects an artifact hash mismatch

test-case.description: rejects a missing artifact
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.rejects a missing artifact

test-case.description: rejects incorrect artifact size
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.rejects incorrect artifact size

test-case.description: rejects duplicate artifact records
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.rejects duplicate artifact records

test-suite.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths
test-suite.description: rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths

test-case.description: rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths("C:\temp\report.json")

test-case.description: rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths("\\server\share\report.json")

test-case.description: rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths("/tmp/report.json")

test-case.description: rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.artifact integrity.rejects absolute and traversal artifact paths("../report.json")

test-case.description: computes Failed when a mandatory test failed
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.completion evidence generation.computes Failed when a mandatory test failed

test-case.description: rejects a contradictory caller-supplied status
test-case.name: Validate evidence action.completion evidence generation.rejects a contradictory caller-supplied status

test-case.description: accepts valid fixtures and rejects invalid fixtures
test-case.name: JSON schema validation.fixtures.accepts valid fixtures and rejects invalid fixtures

test-case.description: passes for the rebuilt repository
test-case.name: Documentation completeness.repository documents.passes for the rebuilt repository

test-case.description: fails shallow authoritative documents
test-case.name: Documentation completeness.invalid documentation.fails shallow authoritative documents

test-case.description: passes a valid one-way workflow call with a pinned action
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.passes a valid one-way workflow call with a pinned action

test-case.description: fails direct self-reference
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails direct self-reference

test-case.description: fails two-file recursion
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails two-file recursion

test-case.description: fails missing reusable workflow target
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails missing reusable workflow target

test-case.description: fails a reusable workflow target missing workflow_call
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails a reusable workflow target missing workflow_call

test-case.description: fails unsupported inputs passed to reusable workflow
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails unsupported inputs passed to reusable workflow

test-case.description: fails unpinned third-party action references
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails unpinned third-party action references

test-case.description: fails broad permissions
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails broad permissions

test-case.description: fails default branch trigger mismatch
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails default branch trigger mismatch

test-case.description: fails invalid local reusable workflow locations
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails invalid local reusable workflow locations

test-case.description: treats valid root distribution templates as informational
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.treats valid root distribution templates as informational

test-case.description: fails a mislabeled root distribution template
test-case.name: GitHub workflow architecture validation.fails a mislabeled root distribution template

test-case.description: passes validate-evidence inputs and writes declared outputs safely
test-case.name: Composite action output wiring.passes validate-evidence inputs and writes declared outputs safely

test-case.description: writes declared outputs in all composite action definitions
test-case.name: Composite action output wiring.writes declared outputs in all composite action definitions

test-case.description: resolves a child path inside the root
test-case.name: GovernanceValidation module.safe path resolution.resolves a child path inside the root

test-case.description: rejects traversal outside the root
test-case.name: GovernanceValidation module.safe path resolution.rejects traversal outside the root

test-case.description: rejects NotRun evidence with an exit code
test-case.name: GovernanceValidation module.test evidence semantics.rejects NotRun evidence with an exit code

test-case.description: accepts valid Passed test evidence
test-case.name: GovernanceValidation module.test evidence semantics.accepts valid Passed test evidence

test-case.description: requires production approval for High risk manifests
test-case.name: GovernanceValidation module.manifest semantics.requires production approval for High risk manifests

test-case.description: passes for repository markdown
test-case.name: Markdown link validation.relative links.passes for repository markdown
